title: Update Records
description: Modify existing data in a table using the UPDATE statement with a filtering condition.
problemStatement:
State change! For the single user with `id = 1`, update their `status` to `'active'`.

**Requirement:** Always use a `WHERE` clause with `UPDATE` to avoid changing every row!
hints: Without a `WHERE` clause, SQL will happily update the status for every single user in the table.
expectedOutput: Status updated for the specific user
solutionCode: UPDATE users SET status = 'active' WHERE id = 1;
